summary: Frontend testing completed for Street Prime Detail landing page. All requested features verified: Productos Afiliados brand carousel with 4 brands (Meguiar's, Armor All, Turtle Wax, Pro Elite), infinite scroll animation working (25s linear infinite), Footer with email contacto@streetprimedetail.com and Mail icon, legal links (Términos y Condiciones, Política de Privacidad) in both Contact section and copyright area, all links have target=_blank and correct PDF paths. PDFs accessible at /docs/*.pdf with HTTP 200 and application/pdf content type. All existing sections working: Hero, Services, Pricing Calculator, Gallery, Reviews, Coverage, CTA, WhatsApp float.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working correctly. Brand carousel uses CSS animation (brand-scroll keyframes) with 25s duration. Brands are duplicated 3x for infinite scroll effect (12 items total). Footer has legal links in Contact section (data-testid: footer-terms-link, footer-privacy-link) and copyright area (data-testid: footer-terms-bottom-link, footer-privacy-bottom-link). PDFs served from /frontend/public/docs/. Google Reviews uses MOCKED fallback data (FALLBACK_REVIEWS array in server.py).

affiliated_brands_section.details: Section visible with data-testid='affiliated-brands-section', title 'Productos Afiliados'

brand_carousel_brands.details: All 4 brands visible: Meguiar's, Armor All, Turtle Wax, Pro Elite with data-testid attributes

carousel_animation.details: CSS animation: 25s linear infinite brand-scroll, 12 items for infinite scroll

footer_email.details: Email contacto@streetprimedetail.com with Mail icon visible in Contact section

bottom_legal_links.details: Both Términos y Condiciones and Política de Privacidad links in copyright area

pdf_accessibility.details: Both PDFs return HTTP 200 with content-type application/pdf

existing_sections.details: Hero, Services, Pricing, Gallery, Reviews, Coverage, CTA, WhatsApp float all working

mocked_apis.google_reviews: Uses FALLBACK_REVIEWS array in server.py when Google Places API unavailable
